user.title: Connect to Mamma Mi Radio
user.description: Point Home Assistant at your Mamma Mi Radio add-on.

data_description.host: The add-on's address. On Home Assistant OS keep the default; on Docker use the container name (for example mammamiradio).
data_description.admin_token: Needed only when Home Assistant reaches the add-on from outside its trusted network (a remote or Docker install). On Home Assistant OS the controls work without it.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the station. Check the host and port, give the add-on a few seconds to finish starting, then try again.
error.unknown: Something unexpected happened. Make sure the add-on is running, then try again.

abort.already_configured: This station is already set up.
